content.text:
create a small html file that says hello world

Don't bother doing any manual verification in a browser. If images are needed, prefer using some stock photos from the web rather than generating them with Nano Banana.

The output should be a single HTML file. Do not modify any other files.

messages.content: I will create a simple, modern `index.html` file with a "Hello World" message and a stock photo background.

toolCalls.name: write_file

args.content:
Hello World

Welcome to your new HTML page.

response.output: Successfully created and wrote to new file: /private/tmp/ghh-gemini-58kzid/gclitemp/index.html.

resultDisplay.newContent:
Hello World

Welcome to your new HTML page.

toolCalls.description:
Writes content to a specified file in the local filesystem.

      The user has the ability to modify `content`. If modified, this will be stated in the response.

messages.content: I have created a modern `index.html` file featuring a "Hello World" message, a glassmorphism container, and a high-quality stock photo background from Unsplash.
